\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
model_backward <- lm(revenue ~ production + coolDD + heatDD,
  data = USSteamCoEstim
)
model_backward <- step(model_backward,
  direction = "backward"
)
\end{Verbatim}

\noindent We observe that this strategy results into the exact same model.
